fields: Stochastic thermodynamics (TUR) × Bacterial cell biology (adder model)

C2-H5.title: FtsZ GTPase ~2000× Over-Dissipating vs DnaA — Precision Bottleneck at Initiation Not Division
C2-H5.reason: Robust TUR calculation with all parameters independently verified. Clean paired falsification test (FtsZ84 vs dnaA46). Direction robust to all parameter uncertainties (ratio >800× even at lowest estimates). Genuinely novel bridge.
novelty_searches: FtsZ GTPase entropy production thermodynamic efficiency cell division precision → zero TUR-FtsZ papers
thermodynamic uncertainty relation bacterial cell size homeostasis adder model → zero TUR-adder papers
counter_evidence_found: Genthon 2026 (arxiv 2601.05193): extrinsic noise dominates — acknowledged but relative comparison still valid

E-H1.title: Variance-Component Decomposition of E. coli Adder — Two-Regime Phase Transition
E-H1.reason: Novel two-regime decomposition with three independent test protocols. All major claims grounded. Risk: Genthon 2026 extrinsic noise dominance may make intrinsic decomposition experimentally unresolvable.
novelty_searches: TUR DnaA counting precision oriC → PRX Life 2023 on protein counting but NO TUR framework
thermodynamic uncertainty relation bacterial cell size homeostasis → zero papers
counter_evidence_found: Genthon 2026: extrinsic noise dominant — threatens measurability of intrinsic decomposition
conditions_for_full_pass: Demonstrate that intrinsic noise components are measurable above extrinsic background
Quantify extrinsic noise fraction from existing single-cell data

C2-H2.title: ppGpp → Supercoiling → N_eff Reduction as Stress-Responsive TUR Tuning
C2-H2.reason: Well-grounded 3-step mechanistic chain (ppGpp → supercoiling → reduced I/τ-site binding → N_eff drop). Clean discriminating test (DnaA overexpression + SHX). Risk: cooperative DnaA filament assembly may invalidate independent-site N_eff framework.
novelty_searches: ppGpp supercoiling DnaA binding oriC precision → Fernández-Coll 2020 showed mechanism but no TUR connection
counter_evidence_found: Cooperative DnaA filament assembly (Grimwade 2007, Rozgaja 2011) challenges independent-site model
Novobiocin inhibits DARS2 function — confounds secondary test
conditions_for_full_pass: Address cooperative DnaA assembly: model how supercoiling affects assembly threshold
Replace novobiocin with inducible topA overexpression to avoid DARS2 confound

E-H2.title: RIDA Kinetic Timing Window — U-Shaped CV vs Hda Titration
E-H2.reason: Novel U-shaped prediction uniquely discriminates kinetic timing window from Landauer (L-shaped) and simple counter-reset (monotonic). Risk: RIDA dispensability (2024 PNAS) suggests alternative reset mechanisms; kinetic parameters derived not measured.
novelty_searches: No paper predicts U-shaped CV vs Hda concentration — confirmed novel

claim_verifications.Maduike_2014_PLOS_Genetics: UNVERIFIABLE — paper not found in search; related Maduike NAR 2014 found

citation_issues: Maduike et al. 2014 PLOS Genetics: not located. May be wrong journal or non-existent. Tool (IPTG-inducible Hda) is standard regardless.
counter_evidence_found: PNAS 2024 (Løbner-Olesen lab): RIDA may be dispensable — novel Hda alleles support viability without RIDA
RIDA dispensability weakens premise that RIDA timing is precision-critical (alternative reset mechanisms exist)
conditions_for_full_pass: Address RIDA dispensability: if cells survive without RIDA, what sets counter-reset precision?

C2-H6.title: TUR Dominates Berg-Purcell for DnaA-oriC — Thermodynamic Not Diffusive Bottleneck
C2-H6.reason: Highly novel dual-bound comparison — no prior TUR vs BPL analysis for same biological system. Theoretical comparison robust across parameter ranges. Critical flaw: primary experiment (DnaA L366K) fatally broken (mutant cannot initiate replication). D_DnaA never measured in vivo.

rubric_scores.falsifiable_prediction: CONDITIONAL — primary test broken, secondary tests valid

novelty_searches: Berg-Purcell limit DnaA oriC thermodynamic uncertainty → zero dual-bound comparisons for same system

claim_verifications.DnaA_L366K_cannot_initiate: VERIFIED — confirmed cannot form pre-RC at oriC
claim_verifications.D_DnaA_effective: PARAMETRIC — never measured in vivo, 0.1-5 μm²/s range possible

citation_issues: Saxena et al. 2013 JBC 288:28232: exact citation not directly confirmed but DnaA L366K mutant extensively documented
counter_evidence_found: DnaA(L366K) cannot initiate replication — primary experiment impossible as designed
D_DnaA effective could be 0.1-0.5 μm²/s (membrane binding), making BPL floor approach TUR
conditions_for_full_pass: Redesign primary experimental test: propose DnaA mobility perturbation that preserves initiation function
Measure or constrain D_DnaA in vivo (single-molecule tracking of DnaA-Halo)

C2-H1.title: Multi-Current TUR Decomposition — Noise Portfolio
C2-H1.reason: Novel noise portfolio concept with informational-vs-structural TUR hierarchy. Individual subsystem calculations verified. Risk: independence assumption unjustified (DnaA-FtsZ STRING 0.920), Genthon 2026 extrinsic noise dominance threatens experimental measurability.

rubric_scores.test_protocol: CONDITIONAL — extrinsic noise may obscure intrinsic signals

novelty_searches: No paper computes multi-subsystem TUR efficiency ratios for bacterial cell cycle — confirmed novel
counter_evidence_found: Genthon 2026: extrinsic noise dominant — intrinsic decomposition may be unmeasurable
conditions_for_full_pass: Address independence: propose test where DnaA-FtsZ coupling is disrupted
Propose measurement strategy that separates intrinsic from extrinsic noise

E-H7.title: Min Pareto-Frontier TUR with Pattern Instability Bifurcation
E-H7.reason: TUR Pareto-frontier interpretation extends Fei & Bhatt 2015 with quantitative predictions. Novel bifurcation coincidence and temperature shift predictions. Risk: qualitative U-shape direction partially published; citation error on Barato & Seifert 2017.

rubric_scores.novelty_verified: CONDITIONAL — extends rather than replaces Fei & Bhatt 2015

novelty_searches: MinCDE oscillation dissipation precision Fei Bhatt 2015 → confirmed: excess dissipation hurts precision (qualitative U-shape published)

claim_verifications.Barato_Seifert_2017_PRL_119_140604: CITATION ERROR — actual paper: PRX 6:041053 (2016). Wrong journal (PRX not PRL), wrong year (2016 not 2017), wrong article number

citation_issues: Barato & Seifert 2017 PRL 119:140604: WRONG. Paper is 'Cost and Precision of Brownian Clocks' in Phys Rev X 6:041053 (2016). Concept correct, citation wrong.
counter_evidence_found: Fei & Bhatt 2015 already showed non-monotonic dissipation-precision in MinCDE — qualitative U-shape partially published
conditions_for_full_pass: Correct Barato & Seifert citation to PRX 6:041053 (2016)
Clearly delineate what predictions go beyond Fei & Bhatt 2015 (bifurcation coincidence, quantitative efficiency)

E-H4.title: DnaA-ATP Membrane-Affinity Gradient — Pole-Biased Origin Firing
E-H4.reason: MECHANISM IMPLAUSIBLE: DnaA diffusion (D~3 μm²/s) homogenizes spatial gradient in <1 second. Counting process operates on minutes timescale. Péclet number ~0.002. Same physics killed C2-H4 in cycle 2 critique.

rubric_scores.counter_evidence: FAIL — does not address DnaA diffusion homogenization
rubric_scores.confidence_calibration: FAIL — 5/10 does not reflect physical impossibility
rubric_scores.groundedness: FAIL — individual claims grounded but combination violates diffusion physics

novelty_searches: No prior paper predicts pole-biased firing from CL-mediated recharging — novel but physically impossible

claim_verifications.Sekimizu_Kornberg_1988_JBC: VERIFIED (page error: 7131 not 7136) — CL catalyzes DnaA nucleotide exchange
claim_verifications.Renner_Weibel_2011_PNAS: VERIFIED — 108:6264, CL at negatively curved regions

citation_issues: Sekimizu & Kornberg 1988 JBC: cited as 263:7136, actual start page is 7131. Minor discrepancy.
fatal_issues: DnaA diffusion D~3 μm²/s across 2 μm cell: equilibration time ~0.33 seconds
Counting timescale: minutes. Gradient cannot persist.
Péclet number ~0.002: spatial transport negligible vs diffusion
Same physics killed C2-H4 in cycle 2 (Critic: 'DnaA diffusion homogenizes gradient in ~1s')
